name: Reforestation Expense Election

eligibility.description: Available to owners of qualified timber property in the U.S. held for commercial timber production. Limit is $5,000 for married filing separately.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to immediately deduct up to $10,000 of reforestation expenditures per qualified timber property each year.
